reviews.review_title: The 4 Months That Changed My Life
reviews.review_description:
4 months ago, I was just someone who was scrolling on YouTube until I saw it. Project Boost was just a small but active community on a game still in development. My first thought was was “I’ve never been given such an amazing opportunity.” And I knew I had to make a difference to myself and everyone. Ever since then, I have been pushing real hard to keep this community going whether it’s helping in game/in the discord, comment positive things in the official channel’s YouTube videos, or making content myself. My #1 goal was to just be known as someone who has changed the game to be the best as possible, and I really hope it comes true. This game is the reason I have my made it so far, and I’m very grateful for the devs RJ, G4IJIN, and Pat for giving me what I never asked for but always wanted. Project Boost has no joke been the only thing I’ve been thinking about lately, and I’m not regretting that. 

	It isn’t just the game that will bring you closer to the community and to make a difference, but what you decide to do to make it happen. Because that is what the game is for, that is what Project Boost is for.

	Thank you Project Boost and thank you to the community

Love, ShmoothieeBot (TheRealShmoothiee)

This game is so fun. Although at first it seems so basic with only 1 map and a couple of game-modes, once you know the movement, time flies by. The community is by far the best thing about this game as I am a moderator, and in the entire time, I've only had to kick 1 player. The community surprises me with how great it is every day, and I have loved being a part of this game. I don't often write reviews for games, yet this game is soo good.

Probably the funnest game on vr. Though king of the hill is confusing but you just have to stay on the hill the longest. I also like how you kinda have to learn the movement since it's physics based, but you can go really fast. But they need to add a tutorial for new players
Im downloading it now and I already know it’s going to be so good

reviews.review_title: The movement is the most fun I’ve tried
reviews.review_description: Insane potential for super high skill ceiling here
This game is so much fun and so enjoyable. Recommed to get this great game.
The movement is just sooooooo smooth
